paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView and "Why Did FRMI Stock Tumble More Than 28% In After-Hours Trading Today?" from Stocktwits. The news items discuss the company's earnings release and call date, as well as the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a SCHEDULE 13G form. Additionally, there was an 8-K form filed on July 15 regarding the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. Insider filings include 1 Form 4 filing. Social posts include discussions of trading and stock performance, with some users expressing optimism about the stock price.
